title: Mend Meter
description: MendMeter is a client-side Minecraft mod that displays more accurate armor durability directly on your screen when holding xp bottles.
body:
# Hold xp bottles to activate!
Hold Bottle o' Experience to see & visualize the gui, will show more accurate and real-time armor durabilities designed to aid the user in stable mend.

# Commands:
### /mendmeter menu
    Opens the drag-and-drop configuration GUI.
    Customize the position of the armor durability overlay.

### /mendmeter toggle
    Disables all GUI rendering when off.

### /mendmeter armorbinds set manual 
    Custom keybinds to take off each of your armor peices, set them in vinilla minecraft keybinds. You can use them while holding XP bottles.
    
### /mendmeter armorbinds set alwaysenabled
    Enables armor binds at all times even if your not holding XP bottles.
    
### /mendmeter armorbinds set off
    Disables all armor binds.
